gt_sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, T1.fastestLapTime FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.fastestLapTime ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.fastestLapTime 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which driver has the fastest lap time? Please give their forenames and surnames.
